span.p: Session begins - first action about to be taken

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is there an environment-context file at .ravenclaude/environment-context.md?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the proposed action fall into a pre-authorized action category for the current environment?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Execute without prompting for authorization - skip the auth round-trip

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is there a matching decision tree in the active plugin for this request?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Traverse the decision tree top-to-bottom against the user context - then select the leaf - only then act

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is there a hook-events.jsonl from the current session with relevant denials?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Read the denial rule before choosing an approach - avoid re-selecting the denied path

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Apply the routing tree to select the right specialist or method - proceed with the standard CGP discipline
